symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(near(reg.breakSeconds(stone, sword), 1.5f), "sword does NOT speed stone");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(near(reg.breakSeconds(dirt, pick), 0.6f),   "pickaxe doesn't speed dirt (no preferred tool)");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(reg.tool(pick) == vg::ToolKind::Pickaxe, "pickaxe is a Pickaxe tool");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(reg.tool(sword) == vg::ToolKind::Sword,  "sword is a Sword tool");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(reg.tool(stone) == vg::ToolKind::None,   "stone is not a tool");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(reg.lightOpacity(stone) == 15,     "stone blocks sky light fully (opaque default)");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(reg.lightOpacity(oakLeaves) == 3,  "leaves dim the sky a little");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(reg.lightOpacity(oakTrunk) == 4,   "trunk dims the sky below it");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(reg.canHarvest(dirt, air),          "dirt drops by hand (no tier gate)");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(!reg.canHarvest(stone, air),        "stone needs a pickaxe (no bare-hand drop)");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(pc.isDead() && pc.health() == 0.0f, "lethal damage -> dead, HP floored at 0");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(wetDrop < dryDrop * 0.5f, "buoyancy: sinks far slower in water than air");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(rise.feetPosition().y > 100.0f, "swim up: holding jump rises in water");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(drown.air() == 0.0f, "breath drains to 0 with head underwater");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(drown.health() < 100.0f, "drowning deals damage once breath is gone");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(crouchDist < walkDist * 0.5f, "sneak walks much slower than a normal walk");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(crouch.sneaking(), "sneak flag set while holding the sneak key");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(held.feetPosition().y > 99.5f, "sneak edge-stop keeps the player on the pillar");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(inBounds, "baked box verts lie within the box bounds");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(shifted, "translating a joint moves its baked box");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(!bad.deserialize(junk, sizeof junk), "corrupt player save is rejected");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(!vg::Crafting::canCraft(*plankRecipe, inv2), "can't craft planks with no wood");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(vg::Crafting::craft(*plankRecipe, inv2), "craft consumes input, yields output");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(store.has(pa) && store.has(pb), "chests recorded at two positions");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(!cbad.deserialize(cjunk, sizeof cjunk), "corrupt chest store is rejected");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(vg::Equipment::accepts(0) == vg::EquipSlot::Feet,    "slot 0 is the boots slot");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(vg::Equipment::accepts(1) == vg::EquipSlot::Trinket, "slot 1 is a trinket slot");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(vg::Equipment::fits(reg, 0, boots),  "boots fit the boots slot");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(!vg::Equipment::fits(reg, 0, swift), "a trinket doesn't fit the boots slot");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(vg::Equipment::fits(reg, 1, swift),  "trinket fits a trinket slot");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(!vg::Equipment::fits(reg, 1, boots), "boots don't fit a trinket slot");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(items.size() == 1, "far item is not picked up");

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(inv3.count(stone) == 0, "far item left the inventory empty");

symbols.name: check

symbols.name: check
symbols.detail: check(climb.feetPosition().y > 0.4f, "auto-step climbs onto a half-slab while walking");
